sections.paragraph:
Original: תּלעת תּולעת תּולעה תּולע

Transliteration: tôlâ‛ tôlê‛âh tôla‛ath tôla‛ath

Phonetic: to-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. worm, scarlet stuff, crimson
    1. worm - the female 'coccus ilicis'
    2. scarlet stuff, crimson, scarlet
      1. the dye made from the dried body of the female of the worm " coccus ilicis"
  2. worm, maggot
    1. worm, grub
    2. the worm " coccus ilicis"

Origin: from H3216

TWOT entry: 2516b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
